quarantine.note: The M15 SBS duplicate merge looks useful, but route_m15-plus needs plus/SBS policy review before promoting the cluster as a whole.

original_do_not_merge.reason: Variant mismatch: M15-SBS (Select Bus Service) and M15+ (Plus service) are distinct route variants. Negative signal confirms 'variant mismatch: ace-dataset,sbs vs plus-label'. Shared base route M15 alone is insufficient for merging variant types.

Variant mismatch: the first record describes M15 SBS (Select Bus Service on 1st/2nd Ave), the second is M15+ (Plus service). The shared alias 'route_m15' is a weak abbreviation applied inconsistently by different source datasets, not an authoritative identity field. Negative signal confirms 'variant mismatch: sbs vs plus-label'.

original_rationale: Two records (route_able-m15-sbs and route_first-second-ave-sbs) describe the same M15 Select Bus Service on 1st/2nd Ave in Manhattan — one from ACE enforcement data (label M15-SBS) and one from the BRT route index (label M15, described as First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS). They share the same corridor, borough, and SBS variant type. Conversely, route_m15-plus is a distinct Plus variant; its route_id 'M15+' differs from M15-SBS, and negative signals confirm variant mismatches with both SBS records.
required_follow_up: Resolve blocker before creating accepted merge/do-not-merge overrides.
Do not apply this packet directly to data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
